title: stelis pompalis
intro: Stelis pompalis is a type of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The Stelis pompalis plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
